title: (Bullish Signal) DIOD, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 31, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 40 similar cases, and 33 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 83%. Current price $82.38 is above $81.57 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 03/01/21 - 03/31/21, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend, while the week of 03/24/21 - 03/31/21 shows a +3% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/ruuuw2ojjlq61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=eb8c8a20cf1764559cdc3ff78c8dbcbeace04b53

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

DIOD moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 31, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for DIOD crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on September 30, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 7 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 44%.

Following a +3.41% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where DIOD advanced for three days, in 273 of 355 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

DIOD may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 182 of 271 cases where DIOD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 67%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10319911-diodes-s-diod-79-84-price-moved-above-its-50-day-moving-average-on-march-31-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
